encoded_placement_predicates: the six named roles p,q,t1,t2,t3,u are pairwise distinct carrier labels
the dangerous support is exactly {q,t1,t2,t3} and is a current PROVEN_ROWS-admissible four-point candidate at center p
the declared surplus and second-large caps are distinct and each has closed-cap cardinality at least five
q lies in the strict interior of the declared surplus cap and is not a Moser apex
the current source-indexed row-choice domain is nonempty for q,t1,t3,u; the t2 supplied row is the dangerous row centered at p
for every declared cap containing p, at least two dangerous-support labels lie outside that cap, matching the source validator's Q-C well-formedness gate
the other two caps are not both cardinality four, matching the current no-M44 profile consequence

quotient.carrier_action: dihedral automorphisms of the concrete cyclic hull order whose induced Moser permutation is size-preserving for the profile and maps every closed cap and strict cap interior exactly
quotient.role_policy: carrier labels and declared cap values are transported; the semantic surplus-cap and second-large-cap fields remain respectively surplus and second
verified: full local candidate-domain invariance in both directions
Burnside orbit count and canonical-representative minimality

omitted_fail_closed: existence or enumeration of compatible supplied/global/critical row assignments at any placement
SAT or UNSAT of the second_center_query row-system DFS away from its two saved seeds
Euclidean coordinates, metric equalities and disequalities, strict convexity, cap orientation, MEC, non-obtuse, or circumscribed-Moser geometry
arbitrary equal-distance pairs not witnessed by an encoded selected-four row
the full U1LargeCapRouteBTailLiveData, U3FixedTriplePacket, localized no-q-free, and full-filter fields
Q-A, Q-C truth beyond placement well-formedness, and Q-E
card 11 and every cardinality other than 12
permutations of the named roles, including any t1/t3 swap not induced solely by the carrier action
cap/profile permutations not induced by a verified cyclic carrier automorphism
a Lean proof that these Python automorphisms are complete
a shared-radius producer, same-cap second-center producer, target-faithful counterexample, or closure of any live sorry

verdict_policy.representative: canonical only under the explicitly verified carrier automorphism group
verdict_policy.note: No placement count or representative asserts a compatible row system, a Euclidean realization, or producer closure.
